C : Type u_3

inst✝² : HopfAlgebra R A

failed_attempts:
simp only [LinearMap.mul_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply]
      ext x
      simp [LinearMap.convMul_def, ← LinearMap.rTensor_def, sum_mul_antipode_eq_algebraMap_counit]

ext x
      simp only [comp_apply, convMul_apply, AlgHom.toLinearMap_apply]
      rw [← sum_mul_antipode_eq_algebraMap_counit (ℛ R x)]
      simp [Repr.comul_apply, HopfAlgebra.toLinearMap_antipodeAlgHom]

ext c

      simp [LinearMap.convMul_def, ← LinearMap.rTensor_def, ← LinearMap.lTensor_def,
        sum_mul_antipode_eq_algebraMap_counit]

calc comul ∘ₗ LinearMap.mul' R C ∘ₗ (LinearMap.id ⊗ₘ antipode R) ∘ₗ comul
        _ = comul ∘ₗ (LinearMap.id * antipode R) := rfl
        _ = comul ∘ₗ Algebra.linearMap R C ∘ₗ counit := by simp [LinearMap.convOne_def]
        _ = Algebra.linearMap R (C ⊗[R] C) ∘ₗ counit := by ext; simp; rfl

simp only [LinearMap.comp_assoc]
      rw [← IsCocomm.comul_comm]
      ext x
      simp [LinearMap.convMul_def, ← LinearMap.lTensor_def, sum_antipode_mul_eq_algebraMap_counit]

ext c
      simp only [comp_apply, id_coe, id_eq, convMul_apply]
      rw [IsCocomm.cocomm_apply]
      simp [LinearMap.comul_right_inv, convOne_def]

rw [IsCocomm.cocomm_eq (R := R) (A := C), ← LinearMap.comp_assoc,
